label: agent channels • agent_channel_* tools are never exposed on external surfaces
query: deterministic policy pin — no model involved
notes: External-surface denial: every registered agent_channel_* tool must be in the externally-denied set (the gate behind /mcp/tools omission and the 403 tool_not_exposable on /mcp/call). Pinned via the same ToolRegistry policy the HTTP surface consults, so a future tool added to the family without the denial marking fails this case immediately. CI-safe: registry-only, no network, no model.
